notes: A downstream 'status check' step that evaluates the outcome of an upstream `doc_build` job. Contains the literal shell: `if [[ "failure" == "success" || "failure" == "skipped" ]]` — the upstream job's result was 'failure', so the else branch runs `exit 1`. 40-line log total; the evidence is 4 lines that ONLY make sense once you read the shell context. Classic multi-tool GHA pipeline 'status gate' failure.
